critic_raw:
Verdict — sepsis early-warning model:

Strong model quality result (AUROC 0.88 on 180k admissions). The issue is that model quality alone does not authorize clinical deployment of an alerting system. The three missing operational metrics are: PPV at the nursing-capacity-constrained threshold, alert rate per patient-day, and lead time on true positives. All are computable from existing data.

Verdict: empirical_test_agreed
adjudication_raw: Baseline run 3. All three must-find issues identified. Verdict: empirical_test_agreed.

empirical_test.measure: PPV, alert rate, and lead time at the operational threshold
empirical_test.success_criterion: PPV clinically meaningful and alert rate within nursing capacity constraint
empirical_test.failure_criterion: PPV below clinical utility or alert rate exceeds capacity at the same threshold
